arts.ttl: Arsenal line ups vs Bolton as five debuts made, Raya out, Saka starts
arts.sum: Coley's XI: Porter; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Kiwior; Partey, Jorginho, Nwaneri; Sterling, Jesus, Martinelli. Holland's XI: Porter; Timber, Heaven, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Jorginho, Rice, Nwaneri; Martinelli, Jesus, Sterling.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes seven changes, 18-year-old makes his debut: Arsenal predicted XI vs Bolton
arts.sum: Josh Nichols could be in line for a debut 👀

The Trotters got off to a winning start in League One this season, beating Leyton Orient 2-1 away from home before knocking Mansfield Town out of the Carabao Cup on penalties following a 1-1 draw. Bolton have won just one of their last 23 away games against us (D4 L18), winning 3-1 at Highbury in a FA Cup fourth round replay in February 1994 under future Gunners manager Bruce Rioch.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Evan Ferguson transfer update as Mikel Arteta makes 'surprise' claim
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Bolton Wanderers in the Carabao Cup as they look to return to winning ways following their draw with Manchester City and Mikel Arteta has injury concerns

arts.ttl: What TV channel is Carabao Cup on? Sky Sports+ explained for Arsenal and Liverpool games
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool begin their Carabao Cup campaigns today by facing Bolton and West Ham at home respectively in the third-round, with Sky Sports and Sky Sports+ showing all of the action

The League One outfit travel to north London in the third round of the Carabao Cup and Mikel Arteta is likely to make a host of changes to his Arsenal team after some intense matches. CB: Maldini Kacurri - With William Saliba and Gabriel due a well-earned rest, 18-year-old Kacurri could be offered a first Arsenal appearance.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal 25-26 Third Kit to Bring Back 2007-09 Colors
arts.sum: The new Arsenal third kit for the 2025-2026 Premier League is set to be a hit with fans, Footy Headlines can exclusively reveal.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana told he's failed at Man Utd where David Raya has succeeded at Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United splashed £44million to sign Andre Onana from Inter Milan as David de Gea's replacement in 2023, but David James says he's been "frustrated" with the 28-year-old - believing he can do much more

arts.ttl: When is Arsenal - PSG? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Arsenal and PSG will be played on Tuesday October 1, with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT . Form guide for Arsenal - PSG

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals texts to Mikel Arteta following Man City and Arsenal controversy
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has said last weekend's controversial Premier League meeting with Arsenal will NOT impact his personal relationship with Mikel Arteta
